word: H2910 - טֻחָה - ṭuchâh - too-khaw' - Inward parts

sections.paragraph:
Original: טחה

Transliteration: ṭûchâh

Phonetic: too-khaw'

BDB Definition:

  1. inner regions, hidden recesses, inward parts

Origin: from H2909 (or H2902) in the sense of overlaying

TWOT entry: 795b

Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine
